parts.text:
[FINANCE] Sender: vip@example.com

I was double charged on my invoice #9923.

[FINANCE] Sender: normal@example.com

Can I get a refund for my last month's payment?

[FINANCE] Sender: angry@example.com

[CHURN] If you don't fix this billing error immediately, I am cancelling my subscription!

[FINANCE] Sender: test1@example.com

My credit card keeps getting rejected on your payment portal.

[FINANCE] Sender: test2@example.com

Please update my billing address to 123 Main St.

[FINANCE] Sender: vip@example.com

[CHURN] I've been overcharged 3 times. I am leaving for your competitor.

[SALES] Sender: lead@example.com

We need a quote for an Enterprise plan with 500 seats.

[SALES] Sender: normal@example.com

How much does it cost to add 10 more users to our Silver tier?

[SALES] Sender: bigcorp@example.com

We are interested in a site license for our entire organization.

[SALES] Sender: test3@example.com

Do you offer discounts for non-profits?

[SALES] Sender: test4@example.com

I want to speak to a sales representative about your new features.

[SALES] Sender: lead2@example.com

Can you send over the pricing sheet for your API?

[TECH] Sender: dev@example.com

The API endpoint /v1/users is returning a 500 error.

[TECH] Sender: normal@example.com

I can't log into my account, it says invalid password.

[TECH] Sender: angry@example.com

[CHURN] Your app keeps crashing every time I open it! Fix this or I cancel.

[TECH] Sender: test5@example.com

How do I export my data to a CSV file?

[TECH] Sender: vip@example.com

[CHURN] Our production database has been down for 2 hours! Unacceptable, we are churning if this isn't fixed.

[TECH] Sender: test6@example.com

The UI is completely broken on Safari browser.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: happy@example.com

Just wanted to say your support team is amazing!

[SATISFACTION] Sender: angry@example.com

[CHURN] Your customer service is terrible. I waited 3 weeks for a reply. I want out.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: normal@example.com

I have some feedback about the new dashboard design.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: test7@example.com

Please forward this compliment to Sarah, she was very helpful.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: test8@example.com

I hate the new update. Please change it back.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: vip@example.com

[CHURN] I am extremely disappointed with the service lately. We are reviewing other vendors.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: test9@example.com

The onboarding process was very confusing.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: test10@example.com

Great product! Would recommend to my friends.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: test11@example.com

Your documentation is out of date and caused me hours of headache.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: angry@example.com

[CHURN] I demand to speak to a manager. This software is useless to me now.

[SATISFACTION] Sender: test12@example.com

I love the new dark mode!

[SATISFACTION] Sender: vip@example.com

Thank you for the quick resolution to my issue.
